name: Pepper Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into a medium bowl.
2. Add pepper to the dry ingredients.
3. In an electric mixer, cream butter with orange peel, vanilla, and almond extract until smooth.
4. Mix in walnuts.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix just until blended.
6. Cover dough and refrigerate until well chilled.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.
9. Divide dough into three equal pieces.
10. Roll each piece into a log with a diameter of about 1 1/2 inches on a lightly floured surface.
11. Arrange two logs on one sheet, spacing them 5 inches apart.
12. Place the third log on the second sheet.
13. Bake until the logs are light brown and golden, about 20 minutes.
14. Allow to cool slightly on the pan.
15. Cut logs into diagonal slices that are about 3/4 inch wide.
16. Turn the cut side down onto the baking sheets.
17. Bake until golden brown, about 15 more minutes.
18. Transfer biscuits to racks and allow to cool thoroughly before storing in an airtight container.
